title: Materials and labour
summary: 9706 — material costs, FIFO/AVCO, labour costing, and inventory valuation.
learningObjectives: Calculate material costs including carriage and discounts.
Apply FIFO and AVCO inventory valuation.
Explain labour cost components: basic, overtime, bonuses.
Prepare material and labour cost statements.

simpleExplanation.title: Costing inputs
simpleExplanation.summary: Material costs include purchase price plus carriage in; labour costs cover wages and related employer costs — both feed into product costing.
steps: FIFO — first in, first out issue price.
AVCO — weighted average after each receipt.
Labour — basic pay + overtime + employer NI.

sections.content: **Materials and labour** (2.1.1) opens costing. Master **FIFO vs AVCO** workings.

sections.label: Mark a materials and labour question
